# empty_table { #cdmconnector.empty_table }

```python
empty_table(type=None, style=None)
```

Return an empty formatted table (DataFrame or GT object).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type        | Description                                                    | Default   |
|--------|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| type   | str or None | "dataframe", "html", or "gt"; default from DEFAULT_TABLE_TYPE. | `None`    |
| style  | str or None | Unused; kept for API compatibility.                            | `None`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                    | Description                                                               |
|--------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame or Any | Empty DataFrame or GT object (when type='gt' and great_tables available). |
